string.name: Command_Description
string.value: Command Description：

string.name: USER_username
string.value: USER        username        Authentication username

string.name: PASS_password
string.value: PASS         password        Authentication password authentication, If the authentication is passed, the state will transition

string.name: APOP_Name
string.value: APOP        name,digest    Recognize a secure method for transmitting passwords, Successful execution leads to state transition, Please refer to RFC 1321

string.name: STAT
string.value: STAT         Send back email statistics, such as the number of emails and the total number of bytes in emails

string.name: UIDL
string.value: UIDL n       Return the unique identifier used for the specified email. If not specified, return all

string.name: LIST
string.value: LIST n       Return the size of the specified email, etc. If not specified, return all

string.name: RETR
string.value: RETR n     Return all text of the email, if not specified, return all

string.name: DELE
string.value: DELE n      Delete, the QUIT command is executed to truly delete

string.name: RSET
string.value: RSET         Revoke all DELE commands

string.name: TOP
string.value: TOP n,m     Return the first m lines of email n, where m must be a natural number

string.name: NOOP
string.value: NOOP        Return a positive response

string.name: QUIT
string.value: QUIT          End Session

string.name: Note
string.value: Note：

string.name: USER
string.value: USER Used for sending email accounts

string.name: PASS
string.value: PASS Used to send email passwords, some emails require authorization codes, such as QQ 163

string.name: Used_STAT
string.value: STAT Used to return the number and size of all emails in the mailbox. Currently, QQ mailbox only returns the email statistics for that day

string.name: Used_LIST
string.value: LIST Used to return the email sequence number and size in the mailbox, the sequence number for not sending emails is the sequence number and size of all emails returned, and the sequence number for sending a certain email is the information of the current email

string.name: Used_DELE
string.value: DELE Used to delete emails, but requires re publishing QUIT after DELE is successful for it to take effect. Currently, the QQ email being tested can take effect by sending DELE

string.name: Used_RSET
string.value: RSET Used to undo the deletion of emails, but it needs to be executed after DELE is successful, and then QUIT will be published for it to take effect. Currently, the QQ mailbox being tested has directly deleted emails sent with DELE

string.name: Used_RETR
string.value: RETR Used to obtain email details, the returned data is encrypted and encoded, and needs to be decoded to display normal content. When there is too much data, it will not be displayed on the text and requires partial data in the stage

string.name: Used_TOP
string.value: TOP The first few lines used to retrieve email information

string.name: Used_NOOP
string.value: NOOP Used to confirm whether the connection with the server is normal, similar to ping/ong in WebSocket

string.name: Used_QUIT
string.value: QUIT Log out and start performing deletion and other operations
